texto: When families save, they can get through emergencies like a bad harvest or a medical emergency. But it's more than that. They can also plan for the future, gradually saving up for a small business or for their children's school tuition.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeff Raikes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “When families save, they can get through emergencies like a bad harvest or a medical emergency. B…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, business, children pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de children e future.
